How it works

Three steps.
Endlessly satisfying.

01
✅

Complete tasks

Add anything — work, health, home, learning. Check it off. Use Focus Mode to earn bonus seeds.

02
🌱

Earn seeds

Every task earns seeds. Daily challenges, streaks, and focus sessions give you bonus seeds to spend.

03
🪴

Grow your garden

Spend seeds in the nursery. Watch your space come alive — interior, garden, or allotment.

Features

Everything you need.
Nothing you don't.

Garden

Your garden,
beautifully alive.

A living room that grows with you. Choose from Interior, Garden, or Allotment modes — each with multiple themes. Every plant you own was earned through real productivity.

🛋 Interior mode 🌻 Garden mode 🥕 Allotment mode 🎨 3 themes
Focus Mode

Lock in.
One task at a time.

Pick 25, 45, 60, or 90 minutes. One task appears at a time — no scrolling, no overwhelm. Finish it, earn a bonus seed, and move to the next. It's embarrassingly motivating.

⏱ 4 session lengths 🌱 Bonus seeds 🎯 Single task view
Weekly Report

See how you
grew this week.

Every week BloomDay shows you your progress — tasks done, streak, completion rate, daily breakdown, and garden health. Progress you can actually see and feel proud of.

📊 Weekly stats 🔥 Streak tracking 💧 Watering log ✅ Completion rate
Calendar

Plan your
whole month.

See your tasks across the full month. Schedule recurring tasks daily or weekly. Every day you complete tasks, your garden gets watered. Every day counts.

📅 Monthly view 🔁 Recurring tasks 💧 Daily watering
Time Capsule

Write a letter
to your future self.

Seal a note and choose a plant to guard it. The letter opens the day your plant reaches full bloom. Part productivity tool, part personal time machine. ❤️

Try it free 🌿
The Nursery
